name: Mackup Runner Game
description: Makeup Runner Game is a fun and fast-paced endless runner game that combines speed with style. Your goal is to run through vibrant tracks, collect makeup tools, cosmetics, and fashion accessories while avoiding obstacles along the way. As you progress, your character transforms into a more glamorous version, unlocking new styles, looks, and exciting levels. Every run is a chance to improve your beauty score and reach the finish line in style!
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
